arts.ttl: Tottenham can ‘return to flame’ for signing they were told was impossible – Now Spurs have January chance
arts.sum: On Tuesday, we covered claims from Italy which stated Tottenham Hotspur are interested in Juventus’ Nicolò Fagioli. Tuttosport bring up Tottenham’s interest in the 23-year-old and suggest they’d have a much better chance now than in the past. The midfielder has clocked in less than 700 minutes from 15 games in all competition this season. The post Tottenham can ‘return to flame’ for signing they were told was impossible – Now Spurs have January chance appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth set asking price for January exit – Contact in place, big move possible
arts.sum: Two days ago, it was reported Juventus are in contact regarding signing Bournemouth defender Marcos Senesi. The Italian giants were offered the chance to sign the South American in the summer and while they rejected the chance then, they are more interested in a January move. TuttoJuve have put forward more information about the situation The post Bournemouth set asking price for January exit – Contact in place, big move possible appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Manchester City will allow striker to seal transfer to Arsenal, Chelsea or Tottenham
arts.sum: Manchester City are not expected to stand in the way of clubs trying to sign Liam Delap from Ipswich Town in the near future. The talented young English forward had a spell at Man City earlier in his career, but didn’t get much playing time before going out on several loan spells. arts.ttl: “Spurs could be nice step” – Bournemouth player encouraged to consider Tottenham transfer
arts.sum: AFC Bournemouth’s Justin Kluivert should consider a move to Tottenham Hotspur in the future. That’s according to former Manchester United defender Jaap Stam, and he backs the 25-year-old to join Tottenham. Stam mentions Tottenham when discussing the Bournemouth star during Viaplay podcast Weijland & Stam, and his comments are relayed by Voetbal Primeur. arts.ttl: What Jerry Jones has previously said about Arsenal owner Stan Kroenke amid Spurs takeover talks
arts.sum: There may be about to be a huge ownership shake-up at Tottenham Hotspur. Indeed, Amanda Staveley has been linked with Spurs for a little while...
